content: Calibration PTQ conventions: datasets C4/Wikitext/Pile/RedPajama/cosmopedia; default 128-256 samples, seqlen 512 (AWQ) or 2048 (AutoRound/GPTQModel); AutoRound can use as few as 128 samples pile-10k. Calibration generates layer activations to drive weight scaling. CPU project (no torch) must replicate: load raw text, tokenize, build calibration tensors. AWQ is sample-efficient; HQQ needs none.
